pricing.freePlanDescription: To get started and explore the platform
pricing.faq1Question: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
pricing.faq1Answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings. Your access will continue until the end of the current billing period.
pricing.faq2Answer: We accept payment via credit cards (Visa, Mastercard), e-wallets, and bank transfer.
pricing.faq3Answer: Yes, courses are updated regularly to keep up with the latest developments in each field.
pricing.faq4Answer: No, accounts are personal and cannot be shared. Each subscriber gets a personalized learning experience.
pricing.needHelp: Need help choosing the right plan?
pricing.contactDescription: Our team is ready to help you choose the plan that best fits your needs
